# Atlas Home Pro

> Premium multi-trade home services for Los Angeles homeowners. One call covers every home system.

## Company

- **Name:** Atlas Home Pro
- **Phone:** 213-275-2210
- **Email:** david@atlashomepro.com
- **Address:** 145 S Fairfax Suite 200, Los Angeles CA 90036
- **Website:** https://atlashomepro.com
- **License:** CSLB Licensed, Bonded & Insured

## Services

Atlas Home Pro provides the following home services across Los Angeles:

- **Plumbing:** Drain cleaning, water heater repair/replacement, slab leak detection, repiping, sewer line repair, leak detection, emergency plumbing
- **HVAC:** AC installation, AC repair, heating systems, duct cleaning, thermostat installation, seasonal tune-ups
- **Electrical:** Panel upgrades, EV charger installation, whole-home rewiring, smart home wiring, solar-ready electrical, generator installation
- **Roofing:** Roof repair, roof replacement, emergency leak repair, roof inspection, gutters & drainage, tile and composition roofing
- **Painting:** Interior painting, exterior painting, cabinet refinishing, drywall repair, color consultation
- **Water & Fire Restoration:** Water damage restoration, mold remediation, smoke and fire damage repair, insurance claim assistance
- **Pest Control:** General pest control, ant control, rodent exclusion, bed bug treatment, quarterly maintenance programs

## Service Areas

Atlas Home Pro serves the following neighborhoods in Los Angeles:

Beverly Hills, Bel Air, Brentwood, Pacific Palisades, Santa Monica, West Hollywood, Westwood, Century City, Hancock Park, Fairfax District, Silver Lake, Los Feliz, Echo Park, Highland Park, Pasadena, Burbank, Glendale, Culver City, Playa Vista, Mar Vista, Venice, Palms, Mid-City, Koreatown, and surrounding West LA communities.

## Pricing Philosophy

Atlas Home Pro uses transparent, upfront pricing — no surprise charges after the job starts. Pricing is competitive with major chains but with a premium quality guarantee. Free estimates on all jobs.

## About

Founded by a Los Angeles real estate investor and property manager with 30+ years of experience maintaining and renovating residential and commercial properties. Atlas Home Pro was built to solve the fragmented, unreliable home services market by offering a single trusted provider across all major trades.

## Education Resources

Free guides for LA homeowners: https://atlashomepro.com/learn/
Topics include plumbing, HVAC, electrical, roofing, painting, restoration, pest control, and home sale preparation.
